name: Uninsured subcontractor forklift hit me on job site, options?
description: Your comp covers; sue them directly.

mainEntity.name: Uninsured subcontractor forklift hit me on job site, options?

acceptedAnswer.text: Your comp covers; sue them directly.
acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp from your employer; sue subcontractor personally if viable.[6] Context: They pay out-of-pocket. Key factors: Asset check. Practical guidance: Attorney pursues judgment; comp bridges gap. Still recover.
